turns.question: What medications is this patient on?

expectations.notes: Bounded 3-turn subset of convo-medications-adherence for the big-model team ladder (gemma-4-31b orchestrator / medgemma-27b expert run slowly, so few turns). T1: the 4 ARVs (stavudine, lamivudine, nevirapine, efavirenz) — naturally tabular. T2: referential count (=4; v1 miscounted order-rows as '14'). T3: all four are ARVs. Exercises detail/tabular output + the multi-turn referential signal.
